Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

The Gentlemen: Season 2 | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Eddie has big plans to expand his thriving empire — with or without Bobby's blessing. Susie starts sniffing out a new way to diversify the business.

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.

snippet.description:

Four years have passed since the events of No Way Home, and Peter is now an adult living entirely alone, having voluntarily erased himself from the lives and memories of those he loves. Crime-fighting in a New York that no longer knows his name, he's devoted himself entirely to protecting his city — a full-time Spider-Man — but as the demands on him intensify, the pressure sparks a surprising physical evolution that threatens his existence, even as a strange new pattern of crimes gives rise to one of the most powerful threats he has ever faced.

snippet.title: Bonnie Tyler - Total Eclipse of the Heart (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Bonnie Tyler - Total Eclipse of the Heart (Traducción al Español / Sub. Español / Letra + Lyrics)
Fecha de lanzamiento: 11/02/1983

🎶 "There's nothing I can do, a total eclipse of the heart"

Traducción al español y subtitulado por Leo + The Pears.

📌 Video musical de "Total Eclipse of the Heart":
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lcOxhH8N3Bo

📌 No olvides seguir a Bonnie Tyler:
https://www.instagram.com/bonnietylerofficial
https://www.facebook.com/BonnieTylerOfficial/

“Total Eclipse of the Heart” es una canción que habla sobre el dolor, la oscuridad emocional y la desesperanza que deja una ruptura amorosa. El eclipse funciona como una metáfora que representa cómo la ausencia del ser amado ensombrece el corazón y hace sentir que la luz y el amor han desaparecido por completo.

#BonnieTyler #TotalEclipseOfTheHeart #PopRock #Lyrics #LetrasDeCanciones

Of listening to the sound of my tears
(Turn around)

That the best of all the years have gone by
(Turn around)

(Turn around)
Every now and then, I get a little bit angry
And I know I've got to get out and cry
(Turn around)
Every now and then, I get a little bit terrified
But then I see the look in your eyes

[Refrain]
(Turn around, bright eyes)
Every now and then, I fall apart
(Turn around, bright eyes)
Every now and then, I fall apart

[Chorus]
And I need you now tonight
And I need you more than ever
And if you only hold me tight
We'll be holding on forever
And we'll only be making it right
'Cause we'll never be wrong
Together, we can take it to the end of the line
Your love is like a shadow on me all of the time (All of the time)
I don't know what to do and I'm always in the dark
We're living in a powder keg and giving off sparks
I really need you tonight
Forever's gonna start tonight
Forever's gonna start tonight

[Post-Chorus]
Once upon a time, I was falling in love
But now I'm only falling apart
There's nothing I can do
A total eclipse of the heart

But now there's only love in the dark

snippet.title: DON'T TURN ON THE LIGHT (Kinger's Song) Feat. Sean Chiplock from The Amazing Digital Circus
snippet.description:
STREAM #DontTurnOnTheLight ON SPOTIFY: https://open.spotify.com/album/3EPV6tUCbI172SvGUTlRW3?si=K89pYciRQiefF0Itwe8kYw

AND EVERYWHERE ELSE: https://ffm.to/kinger

MORE ORIGINAL MUSIC HERE: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PrMjrvz5hyc&list=PLv1P-6YxEm6AgF6yiKtydFevNQV4RxKn4&index=1

Another stellar video from the brilliant animation team at Giddy Goat Studios!! HUGE thanks to Sean for powering through this tongue-twister of a song! We wanted to capture the duality of Kinger's personality and create a lyrical and instrumental contrast between the chaos of his mind when the lights are on, and the reflective state he enters when the lights are off. Kinger is definitely one of my favorite characters from TADC, and we really hope we did his story justice!

SONG CREDITS:
Written by Gabe & Nate brown (Black Gryph0n & Baasik)
Produced by Nate Brown (Baasik): https://www.youtube.com/user/Baasikmusic

FEATURING:
Sean Chiplock (as Kinger): https://www.instagram.com/schiplock/
Gabriel Brown (as Kinger's inner voice): https://www.instagram.com/BlackGryph0n/

Claire M Corlett - Producer & Director
Katie Nelson - Producer & Director

Gabby Gillespie - 3D Animator
Bordin Sriwattana - 3D Animator
Logan McCloud - 3D Animator

Michaela Pulizos - Storyboard Artist

ZayJax - Character Rigs

Environment Assets by https://tadcworldpack.crd.co/

But I feel it in my body

Kind of like I’ve been edited
By the thoughts inside my head
And I really wish I could run from it
But it’s running me instead

It’s like somebody’s flushing
My higher functions down the drain
I would think I’m going crazy
If I wasn’t so insane

I’ve seen it all before
But the only place I recognize
Is in my pillow fort

I wish I could remember
What I came out here to do
But how’s that even possible
When I can’t remember you

I hear 10,000 voices
And they’re all talking super loud
But at least I’m not hallucinating
Wait, is that a cow?

Feels like all my thoughts are leaking
Out of little holes inside my mind
And I haven’t had a memory
Since nineteen-something-nine

Darkness...

I suddenly remember her...

A little more clearly
And though it’s all fleeting
I know I’m still me

I’m still here because she

And that makes me believe that
One day I’ll be free from the

Hello DDR’s (dedicated description readers)

Hasn't been too long this time, huh?! Let's see, what's happened since the last time we spoke... I got sick and lost my voice (which SUCKS because I have a LOT of stuff I need to record and I am not very patient, but it has given me a good excuse to work on my hobbies like flying and upgrading my plane, so that's been nice).

Claire turned 27 yesterday (HAPPY BIRTHDAY CLAIRE!!) We went shopping all day, then had beignets and opened presents with my family, so that was fun!

Oh yeah, and the Insane music video got taken down by Amazon! As frustrating as that was, we've actually been able to make some pretty good headway on that situation (big thanks to Viv and the SpindleHorse team for being so helpful and supportive of fan content)! I have high hopes we'll get the video back up soon, fingers crossed!

In the meantime, feel free to watch one of the many reuploads on other people's channels. That animation is far too good to be buried!!

Ok, I think that's it. Thank you all! Your love and support mean the world to us!

~Gabe

Another stellar video from the brilliant animation team at Giddy Goat Studios!! HUGE thanks to Sean for powering through this tongue-twister of a song! We wanted to capture the duality of Kinger's personality and create a lyrical and instrumental contrast between the chaos of his mind when the lights are on, and the reflective state he enters when the lights are off. Kinger is definitely one of my favorite characters from TADC, and we really hope we did his story justice!

Hello DDR’s (dedicated description readers)

Hasn't been too long this time, huh?! Let's see, what's happened since the last time we spoke... I got sick and lost my voice (which SUCKS because I have a LOT of stuff I need to record and I am not very patient, but it has given me a good excuse to work on my hobbies like flying and upgrading my plane, so that's been nice).

Claire turned 27 yesterday (HAPPY BIRTHDAY CLAIRE!!) We went shopping all day, then had beignets and opened presents with my family, so that was fun!

Oh yeah, and the Insane music video got taken down by Amazon! As frustrating as that was, we've actually been able to make some pretty good headway on that situation (big thanks to Viv and the SpindleHorse team for being so helpful and supportive of fan content)! I have high hopes we'll get the video back up soon, fingers crossed!

In the meantime, feel free to watch one of the many reuploads on other people's channels. That animation is far too good to be buried!!

Ok, I think that's it. Thank you all! Your love and support mean the world to us!

~Gabe

snippet.title: MANHUNTER: THE FINAL CUT | Official Trailer | STUDIOCANAL
snippet.description:
The film that redefined the modern thriller. 40 years on, Michael Mann’s pulsating, cutting-edge MANHUNTER: THE FINAL CUT returns to cinemas in a brand new breathtaking 4K restoration supervised by Michael Mann. Coming to the US via Rialto Pictures on July 24th and StudioCanal UK on September 25th, with further international releases this fall. 

#manhunter #michaelmann #4k 

A retired criminal profiler (William Petersen) reluctantly returns to the FBI to help track down a serial killer of families and is forced to consult an expert - the imprisoned Dr. Hannibal Lecktor (Brian Cox in a subtly chilling performance). 

The third feature written and directed by Michael Mann is a gripping adaptation of the first of Thomas Harris’s famed crime novels and benefits from the filmmaker’s typically striking visuals as well as a top notch supporting cast including Tom Noonan as Francis Dolarhyde - the hunted killer known as the Red Dragon or the "Tooth Fairy" - along with three-time Oscar nominee Joan Allen (The Contender, 2000) as his blind love interest.

Find out more at http://www.studiocanal.com 🎥

STUDIOCANAL is Europe’s leading movie & television studio with one of the world’s largest film libraries. The official STUDIOCANAL YouTube channel showcases the latest trailers for upcoming releases + clips and exclusive content from our extensive and celebrated library. Enjoy - and subscribe for more!
